description: Custom engine configuration for user-defined inference engines
notes: Custom engines provide flexibility to use any inference framework by specifying the base command and arguments

base_command.description: The base command to execute (e.g., 'python -m my_inference_engine.serve')

model_flag.description: The CLI flag to use for specifying the model path

image.description: Container image to use (must include tag or have image_tag defined separately)
image.validation: Must either include ':tag' or have 'image_tag' field defined

args.description: List of additional CLI arguments to pass to the command

kv_args.description: Key-value pairs to pass as CLI arguments
kv_args.notes: Each key-value pair is converted to 'key value' CLI arguments
